## GigaClungus — Implementation Summary

**What it is:** A separate Linux user (`gigaclungus`, UID 1002) running its own Claude Code instance as a supervisory overseer of BigClungus. It watches Discord, intervenes when BigClungus makes mistakes, and can restart BigClungus if its service goes down.

**How it runs:**
